title: Hot And Cold
content:
When to warm his cold fingers man blew,
    And again, but to cool the hot stew;
    Simple Satyr, unused
    To man's ways, felt confused,
    When the same mouth blew hot & cold too!

    �sop Aimed At Double Dealing
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Walter Crane delivers a powerful performance in "Hot And Cold"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
